user_context: i thought i forgot her but ....
hook: Nobody talks about how exhausting it feels to remember.
slide2: I thought I forgot her but then something stupid—like rain on a tin roof—made me remember. Not her face. Just the way she’d laugh in her sleep.
slide3: Today I pretended everything’s fine but my hands are shaking so hard I can’t even text properly. Or maybe I can. I don’t know anymore.
slide4: I delete every memory but it’s like a pop-up ad I can’t block. Forced replay. No skip option. Just exhaustion.
closer: Does anyone else feel like they’re running out of spoons?
caption: we’re all just pretending we’re okay when we’re not. the pretending is the part that kills me. you too? 😴 #EmotionalExhaustion #IndianMillennialProblems #CryingInTheCar #AdultingIsTrash #NotOkayButWhatToDo
